# Upstream

This Apple-only adapter is derived from `XIIIFOX/flutter_vless` 1.1.4 at
commit `7e17d99`. Android, macOS, and Windows plugin registrations were removed
so the existing platform implementations in this application remain unchanged.

The iOS build downloads `XRay.xcframework` v26.6.27 with SHA-256:

`c4611c9ce9d9fc44956bc96f1886396507da34fd3892b94ebe96982721575774`

The upstream MIT license is preserved in `LICENSE`. Xray-core is distributed
under MPL-2.0 and Tun2SocksKit under MIT.
